creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Maintainer timeout (1 month).

This PR is related to PR#167289 in mail/dspam-devel, which also has been 
in maintainer timeout for a while (1 year, same maintainer).

The patch in PR#167289 should be applied to mail/dspam-devel to bring 
that port up to date with the current upstream release.

Then, if there are no disagreements, mail/dspam-devel should be merged 
in to mail/dspam to bring this port up to date as well.

The mail/dspam-devel port is about a year out of date from upstream, and 
the mail/dspam port is about three years out of date (and a major rev 
behind).

The dspam-devel port made sense back when there was a lot of active 
development on dspam and there were several alphas/betas/RCs floating 
around, but that hasn't been the case in a long while.  Maybe time to 
retire dspam-devel?

Thanks,
Danny Warren
